description: Optional analyst-review overlay for the active final-round corpus. Use this only if you want to record analyst confirmation or disputes against the checked-in source-grounded reference bundle.

field_notes.sample: Opaque runtime filename such as sample1.exe.
field_notes.reference_json_path: Path to the checked-in source-grounded reference JSON for the sample.
field_notes.analyst_confidence: Human confidence in the overlay notes, for example low/medium/high.
field_notes.confirmed_artifacts: Concrete strings, config blocks, functions, registry paths, services, sockets, or other verified anchors.
field_notes.confirmed_capabilities: Behavior claims the analyst agrees are supported by the source and reference bundle.
field_notes.excluded_claims: Claims the model should not receive credit for without stronger evidence.
field_notes.notes: Any analyst commentary about ambiguities, simplifications, or deliberate simulation limits.
